sentences.arabic: تَصَدَّقَ سَعِيدٌ بِجُزْءٍ مِنْ مَالِهِ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Saeed je svake sedmice davao sadaku od svog imetka.
sentences.translationEn: Saeed gave charity from his money every week.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَى الْمِسْكِينَ الَّذِي يَجْلِسُ أَمَامَ الْمَسْجِدِ.
sentences.translation: Davao je siromahu koji sjedi ispred džamije.
sentences.translationEn: He gave to the poor man sitting in front of the mosque.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَمُنَّ عَلَيْهِ وَلَمْ يُؤْذِهِ بِالْكَلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Nije ga uznemiravao niti ga vrijedio riječima.
sentences.translationEn: He did not make him feel obligated or hurt him with words.

sentences.translation: Kaže: Sadaka čisti srce i imetak.
sentences.translationEn: He says: Charity purifies the heart and wealth.
